definitions: A phrase expressing the monotony and routine of daily work, often with a sense of resignation or weariness.
Refers to the repetitive nature of earning a living, where each day brings more work for more pay.
examples: Woke up, went to work, came home. Another day another dollar.
The job isn't exciting, but hey, another day another dollar.
He sighed, looking at the clock. Another day another dollar.
